title: crotalaria rubiginosa var. scabrella
intro: Crotalaria rubiginosa var. scabrella, also known as the rough-flowered rattlebox, is a plant species in the legume family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria rubiginosa var. scabrella include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including fever and respiratory issues.
